Adapt an agent event stream for Shiny chat demos

Source: R/shinychat.R
as_shinychat_stream.Rd

Adapt an agent event stream for Shiny chat demos

Usage

as_shinychat_stream(stream)

Arguments

stream

A stream returned by agent$stream().

Value

The same stream object. This lightweight adapter keeps the core package UI-free while giving Shiny examples a stable extension point.

On this page
